text:
Sophia Smith pulled back on her favorite right foot before letting off a lethal far-post shot from close range. The ball cut through the humid New Jersey air before ricocheting against the back of the net, allowing the U.S. womenГўВҖВҷs national teamГўВҖВ”and the crowd at Red Bull ArenaГўВҖВ”a sigh of relief. The breakthrough goal, coming in the 64th minute, proved to be the decider, securing the USWNT a 1ГўВҖВ“0 win over Mexico on Saturday.

The result was a perfectly respectable one against a formidable opponent, while also highlighting plenty of areas of improvement for Emma HayesГўВҖВҷs young side ahead of the Paris Olympics. SaturdayГўВҖВҷs friendly was the first of two send-off matches for the USWNT before they head to the Summer Games.

ГўВҖВңFor the chances weГўВҖВҷve created, weГўВҖВҷre not hitting the frame enough,ГўВҖВқ Hayes said after the match. ГўВҖВңItГўВҖВҷs teaching them the right moments when to progress and when not to progress. And then in and around the penalty box, how to access the right spaces, in the right moments, in the right time. ThatГўВҖВҷs going to take a little bit of time.ГўВҖВқ

The U.S.ГўВҖВҷs lone goal came from the familiar frontline duo of Smith and Mallory Swanson. The two, along with winger Trinity Rodman and attacking midfielder Rose Lavelle, played off each other with a palpable fluidity, creating a number of dangerous chances in the final third.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңI was really happy for Soph ГўВҖВҰ I thought her and Mal were so dynamic,ГўВҖВқ Hayes said. ГўВҖВңAnd Trin got a little bit more space, but for me itГўВҖВҷs execution, thatГўВҖВҷs what I will focus on.ГўВҖВқ

Smith echoed her coachГўВҖВҷs statement, saying after the match that she wished sheГўВҖВҷd finished off a few more chances.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңThe cool thing about our attacking players is we can kind of all play all over the place, move around, be dynamic and if something feels right for someone in a different space, we can go into that space and others will fill,ГўВҖВқ Smith said. ГўВҖВңWe lost a little patience in the final third. I think we get excited when we get in there, but maybe one touch too many, one pass too many.ГўВҖВқ

Finishing has been a longstanding issue for the USWNT, with the squad only scoring four goals in four games during their ill-fated 2023 World Cup run. Hayes and her team hope some fine tuning and more time together will remedy any lingering scoring woes. After all, SaturdayГўВҖВҷs match was the first outing since Hayes announced herOlympic roster, and came amid only her second camp with the USWNT.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңI think weГўВҖВҷve been together maybe total two weeks from last camp to this camp and it just feels like weГўВҖВҷve learned and grown so much in those two weeks,ГўВҖВқ Lavelle said, adding that the team has been eagerly taking in knowledge from their new coach.

Hayes has been vocal about her mission to develop young talent, fostering the U.S.ГўВҖВҷs emerging player pool while also keeping an eye on the fast-approaching Olympics. ItГўВҖВҷs clear, however, that as much as the USWNT would like to improve upon their bronze-medal finish from the Tokyo Games, success now wonГўВҖВҷt come at the expense of sustainable growth for the future. Perhaps, for that reason, it was important for Hayes to give young players opportunities, including Washington Spirit star Croix Bethune, who earned her first USWNT cap Saturday.ГӮ

And as one player enjoyed her first appearance, another celebrated her 100th. The team honored goalkeeper Alyssa NaeherГўВҖВҷs 100th USWNT appearance before the game, bestowing her with a framed jersey for the occasion. When asked about NaeherГўВҖВҷs impact on the squad, her teammates beamed, almost all of them heaping praise on the notoriously attention-averse 36-year-old.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңI am obsessed with Alyssa,ГўВҖВқ Smith said. ГўВҖВңShe is amazing, I think everyone can say the same things about her. She is a leader in every way. She shows up every single day with the best attitude. She is such a selfless person. We see all the big saves she makes, and she is a hero in that way, but we all look up to her so much. She is the best teammate, the best friend, the best human.ГўВҖВқ

Naeher wasnГўВҖВҷt the only one to get her flowers. The 1999 teamГўВҖВ”celebrating the 25th anniversary of its World Cup winГўВҖВ”was also honored ahead of the match. A new USWNT era may be on the horizon under Hayes, but SaturdayГўВҖВҷs match was something of a throwback, with ГўВҖВҳ90s classics like CherГўВҖВҷs ГўВҖВңBelieveГўВҖВқ bumping through Red Bull Arena to celebrate the squad. The 26,376 fans in attendance erupted for the likes of Mia Hamm and Brandi Chastain, who gathered at midfield ahead of the opening whistle.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңI know right now we are in a moment where we are trying to rewrite our own narrative and have this team talk about itself, but I donГўВҖВҷt think we get to this unless we know our history and know our past and definitely the ГўВҖВҳ99ers were women who pushed the envelope and basically started this whole thing,ГўВҖВқ forward Lynn Williams said. ГўВҖВңAll the things we have right now [donГўВҖВҷt] happen without them.ГўВҖВқ

The tribute was fitting given the current state of the team, now under a new head coach and looking to forge its own identity amid a generational shift. Being in the midst of the ГўВҖВҳ99ers and reminded of the enduring legacy of the USWNT ahead of the Olympics seems to be a powerful form of motivation. As for HayesГўВҖВҷs current group, there is still work to be done on the pitch. The squad showed flashes of what could be on Saturday, but, as the Olympics near, the USWNT is still a work in progress.ГӮ

Clare Brennan is an associate editor for Sports Illustrated focused on womenГўВҖВҷs sports. Before joining SI in October 2022, she worked as an associate editor at Just WomenГўВҖВҷs Sports and as an associate producer for WDET in Detroit. Brennan has a bachelorГўВҖВҷs in international studies from the University of Wisconsin and a masterГўВҖВҷs in art history from Wayne State University.

title: USWNT Remains a Work in Progress After Win Over Mexico Ahead of Paris Olympics
description: The Americans earned a 1ГўВҖВ“0 win in the friendly, but must show they're ready for primetime at the Summer Games.
